leadText: The Zoom Lens (Japanese: フォーカスレンズ Focus Lens) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV that boosts the holder's accuracy.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] This move effect may be in need of research. Reason: How does it interact with Instruct and Dancer? Does item use or switching count as having moved? You can discuss this on the talk page. Boosts the holder's accuracy by 20% (a factor of 4915/4096 in Generation V onward) against targets that have already used a move in the same turn.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder moves after the foe, its critical-hit ratio will be boosted . Pt HG SS An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder moves after the foe, its accuracy will be boosted. B W B2 W2 An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder moves after its target, its accuracy will be boosted. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder moves after its target moves, its accuracy will be boosted. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder acts after its target, its move will be more accurate than usual.

Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods D P Pt Veilstone Game Corner (1,000 Coins ) HG SS Goldenrod Game Corner / Celadon Game Corner (1,000 Coins ) B W Castelia City Pokémon Center (from a man in black for having Pokémon from 20 different original Trainers ) Battle Subway (48 BP ) B2 W2 Battle Subway / PWT (12 BP ) X Y Lumiose City ( Shutterbug Café ) Battle Maison (48 BP ) OR AS Battle Maison (48 BP ) S M US UM Dimensional Research Lab US UM Battle Royal Dome (48 BP ) Sw Sh Route 9 BD SP Veilstone City S V Delibird Presents ( Levincia Branch, after earning 4 Gym Badges )

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] In Diamond and Pearl , the description incorrectly states that the Zoom Lens boosts the critical hit ratio rather than accuracy.
